heroInsight: Carousel posts are dominating with 55% of total formats, achieving average likes of 138, making them the top format for engagement right now.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are leading in engagement, with Reels remaining a strong contender despite less data; Stories are critical for daily engagement boosts.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels continue to perform with high engagement due to their dynamic nature and emphasis on the first 3 seconds of retention.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are currently the engagement king with massive save rates and an average of 138 likes.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories remain vital for maintaining day-to-day engagement, with their ephemeral nature driving urgency.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are seeing reduced engagement with an average of 22 likes, highlighting a shift towards more interactive formats.

trendingHooks.template: I stopped [X] and here's what happened
trendingHooks.example: I stopped taking pre-workout and here's what happened
POV: You're 3 months into your cut and someone offers you pizza
I tried keto lean bulk for 30 days and here's my transformation
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Challenges norms and shows tangible results

trendingHooks.example: RPE vs percentage training — which is better?

trendingHooks.template: What I eat in a day for [goal]
trendingHooks.example: What I eat in a day for bulking (2100 Cals, 160g Protein)
Why I stopped using lifting straps

postingTimes.summary: Peak engagement potential seen in early morning and late afternoon posts.

hashtagIntel.recommendation: Use for humorous gym content during peak engagement hours.
Pair with posts featuring the Darc Sport x Von Dutch collection.
Ideal for niche gym culture content and gym lifestyle posts.

actionItems.action: Post a carousel featuring your cutting season meal prep with a transformation story.
actionItems.expectedBoost: High engagement due to peak posting time and relevance to current trends.

actionItems.action: Create a Reel using 'Monkeys Spinning Monkeys' for a gym humor skit.
actionItems.expectedBoost: Increased shares due to the humorous and relatable content.

actionItems.action: Host a Story poll about RPE vs percentage training with insights.
actionItems.expectedBoost: Engagement through interactive content and trending topic.

actionItems.action: Film a TikTok using 'Debussy "Clair de Lune"' for a dramatic transformation reveal.
actionItems.expectedBoost: High emotional engagement due to the music choice.

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes — prioritize content that encourages sharing.
Saves = 25% of ranking power — create content that viewers want to bookmark.
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels — hook viewers immediately.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned from recommendations.
Carousels seeing massive save rates, rivaling Reels for engagement.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Include transformation stories in Reels — boosts retention and shares.
Stories with polls or quizzes drive up interaction — use them for quick engagement.
Optimize captions for DM-worthy insights — increases shareability.

tiktokCrossover.summary: TikTok trends often precede Instagram adoption; watch for early signs.

crossPosts.title: Transformation Reveal
crossPosts.hook: Watch how I transformed in just 3 months!
crossPosts.why: High emotional engagement with dramatic audio, proven by top TikTok trends.

crossPosts.hook: Slide 1: My go-to cutting season meals
crossPosts.format: 5 slides, meal prep and macros details
crossPosts.why: Carousels drive high saves, and this topic is currently trending.

crossPosts.title: Training Debate Poll
crossPosts.hook: RPE vs Percentage: Which do you prefer?
crossPosts.why: Interactive content drives quick engagement, tapping into trending debate.

crossPosts.title: Gym Humor Skit
crossPosts.hook: When you hit a PR but nobody's watching...

crossPosts.why: Aligns with top TikTok humor trends and high view counts.

crossPosts.title: Gym Culture Debate
crossPosts.hook: RPE or percentage-based training: What's your take?
crossPosts.why: Drives replies and engagement through debate on a trending topic.

crossPosts.title: Gym Fashion on a Budget
crossPosts.hook: How to look stylish without breaking the bank
crossPosts.format: Deep dive on affordable brands and styling tips
crossPosts.why: In-depth exploration of a rising trend with actionable advice.
